description_long: This is an ornate ceiling-mounted chandelier featuring six cylindrical lampshades arranged in a circular pattern around a central stem. The fixture is suspended by a decorative chain and canopy, with elegant curved arms extending outward to support each lampshade. The arms are adorned with scrollwork and subtle ornamental details, giving the piece a classic and sophisticated appearance. The lampshades are opaque and likely made of fabric or frosted glass, diffusing the light for a soft glow. The main structure appears to be constructed from metal, finished in a uniform, muted color. This chandelier is designed to serve as a prominent lighting feature in upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, dining rooms, or entryways.
description: A decorative ceiling-mounted chandelier with six cylindrical lampshades and ornate metal scrollwork, suspended by a chain and canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of six lampshades and the central stem with visible scrollwork arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chandelier, the curvature of the arms, and the layered structure of the central stem.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all six lampshades and scrollwork arms visible, emphasizing the fixture's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the chandelier and the arrangement of the arms and shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a classic and elegant design with ornate scrollwork and cylindrical lampshades, blending traditional and vintage influences for a sophisticated appearance.
